df_recode <- df %>%
  # Ensure all scale columns are numeric (coercing non-numeric to NA first)
  mutate(across(all_of(all_scale_cols), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>%
  # Recode 99 to 0 for all scale items
  mutate(across(all_of(all_scale_cols), ~ ifelse(. == 99, 0, .)))
